name: vendor.myndhyve.ads-publish-google
description: MyndHyve ads.publish.google — publish an ad to Google Ads API v18 (Search + Display). Symmetric companion to ads-publish-meta. Resolves 2 secrets (OAuth + developer-token) via ctx.secrets.resolve, then runs the 4-step publish pipeline (budget → campaign → ad-group → ad) with best-effort REMOVE-rollback. Supports 6 bidding strategies + 6 channel types + responsive_search & responsive_display ad formats.
author: MyndHyve

nodes.label: Publish Ad to Google Ads
nodes.description: Single typeId. Inputs: oauthCredentialRef + developerTokenCredentialRef (TWO opaque secret refs — Google needs both) + customerId + optional loginCustomerId (for MCC) + campaign + adGroup + ad. Resolves both secrets via ctx.secrets.resolve(ref, purpose) with separate purpose strings, then sequentially mutates: campaignBudget → campaign → adGroup → adGroupAd (responsive_search OR responsive_display). Best-effort REMOVE-status rollback on failure in REVERSE creation order (Google Ads has no cascade-delete). Returns all 4 resource names + budget resource name + publishedStatus + publishedAt.
